## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's potential sponsorship and speaking opportunities at SEMrush's upcoming conference.](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is considering the Diamond sponsorship package, which includes a speaking slot, mastermind session, and booth presence](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [SEMrush's conference attracts 75%+ decision-makers, with a European-heavy audience (70-75%) and 25-30% US attendees](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Additional opportunities include curated meetings package and VIP reception co-sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [SEMrush is open to GrowthX's participation despite some product overlap, as they're not direct competitors](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

## Topics

### Sponsorship Package Details

  - [Diamond package includes speaking slot, mastermind session, booth presence](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Additional options: party sponsorship, lounge sponsorship, curated meetings package](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Curated meetings: SEMrush arranges meetings with desired attendees or companies](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [VIP speaker reception co-sponsorship opportunity available (not in original package)](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

### Conference Audience Breakdown

  - [75%+ decision-makers (higher than last year)](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Pivoting towards enterprise audience with new enterprise stage](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Audience composition: 70-75% European, 25-30% US, some Asian territory](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Attracts CMOs, CEOs, founders, and other senior decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### Networking Opportunities

  - [SEMrush-hosted events: opening reception, VIP speaker reception, general reception, after-party](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Sponsors can host their own dinners or events](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [SEMrush provides attendee list for pre-event outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Recommended to have 3-4 team members present for optimal coverage and networking](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### Product Overlap Concerns

  - [SEMrush is open to GrowthX's participation despite some product similarities](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Only direct competitors are on the "no" list for sponsorships](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [GrowthX's AI and marketing focus aligns well with conference themes](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

### Speaking and Mastermind Topics

  - [GrowthX's proposed topic: Using AI in marketing, building systems with people and AI](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [SEMrush team (Marina, Marcel) will review and potentially suggest tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Mastermind session topic can be similar or different, pending discussion](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to confirm Diamond sponsorship package by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [SEMrush to provide detailed breakdown of attendee regions](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [SEMrush to check and provide details on VIP reception co-sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider curated meetings package and VIP reception co-sponsorship](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [GrowthX to send proposed speaking and mastermind session topics for review](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [SEMrush to provide feedback on proposed topics and suggest any necessary tweaks](https://fathom.video/share/Ue9engZ5bSDWnDAHWHcFKF2nPyQj2RjJ?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
